resnet18_finetuned.name: ResNet18 fine-tuned transfer learning
resnet18_finetuned.description: Final packaged deployment baseline. Classical transfer learning with a ResNet18 backbone and a 4-class classifier head.
resnet18_finetuned.preprocessing: resize shortest side to 256, center crop to 224, scale to [0,1], ImageNet normalization, NCHW

custom_cnn_small_int8.name: Custom CNN Small INT8
custom_cnn_small_int8.description: Lightweight custom CNN comparison model. INT8 ONNX keeps the payload small while still returning the same 4-class scene labels.
custom_cnn_small_int8.preprocessing: resize directly to 224, scale to [0,1], ImageNet normalization, NCHW
